h1: font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(0, 102, 204); margin: 0.8em 0; line-height: 1.3; border-bottom: 3px solid rgb(0, 102, 204); padding-bottom: 0.3em;
h2: font-size: 22px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); margin: 0.7em 0; line-height: 1.4; border-left: 5px solid rgb(0, 102, 204); padding-left: 0.5em;
h3: font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); margin: 0.6em 0; line-height: 1.5;
h4: font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(85, 85, 85); margin: 0.5em 0; line-height: 1.5;
h5: font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(85, 85, 85); margin: 0.4em 0; line-height: 1.5;
h6: font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(85, 85, 85); margin: 0.4em 0; line-height: 1.5;
p: margin: 0px 8px 1.2em; padding: 0px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 1px; line-height: 1.8;
a: color: rgb(0, 102, 204); text-decoration: none; font-weight: normal; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(0, 102, 204);
img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 4px 12px; display: block; margin: 1.5em auto;
code: font-family: 'Courier New', Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; background-color: rgb(245, 245, 245); padding: 0.2em 0.5em; border-radius: 4px; color: rgb(199, 37, 78); border: 1px solid rgb(230, 230, 230);
pre: margin: 1em 8px; background: rgb(40, 44, 52); border-radius: 6px; padding: 1em; font-size: 14px; overflow-x: auto; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 2px 8px;
blockquote: margin: 1.5em 8px; padding: 1em 1.5em; border-left: 5px solid rgb(0, 102, 204); background-color: rgb(248, 250, 252); color: rgb(85, 85, 85); font-style: italic;
li: margin: 0.6em 0; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 1px; line-height: 1.8;
table: margin: 1.5em 8px; border-collapse: collapse; width: calc(100% - 16px); font-size: 15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 8px;
th: padding: 0.8em 1em; border: 1px solid rgb(220, 220, 220); font-weight: bold; background-color: rgb(0, 102, 204); color: rgb(255, 255, 255);
td: padding: 0.8em 1em; border: 1px solid rgb(220, 220, 220); color: rgb(51, 51, 51);
hr: border-style: solid; border-width: 2px 0 0; border-color: rgb(230, 230, 230); margin: 2em 0;
